NormalIncomeCodes.explanation: Amounts paid or payable to an employee for services rendered, excluding Long Service Cash Awards. Examples: salary/wages, backdated salary/pension, remuneration to migrant/seasonal workers, etc.
Amounts paid or payable to an employee for services rendered, excluding Long Service Cash Awards. Examples: salary/wages, backdated salary/pension, remuneration to migrant/seasonal workers, etc.
Non-taxable income excluding Foreign Service remuneration for RSA residents that are exempt. Examples: war pensions, non-taxable portion of arbitration awards, capital element of annuities.
Non-taxable income excluding Foreign Service remuneration for RSA residents that are exempt. Examples: war pensions, non-taxable portion of arbitration awards, capital element of annuities.
Compulsory pension or qualifying purchased annuity paid on a regular basis, including backdated payments. Includes taxable disability benefits.
Compulsory pension or qualifying purchased annuity paid on a regular basis, including backdated payments. Includes taxable disability benefits.
Non-taxable pensions paid on a regular basis (e.g., war pensions). Incorporated into 3602/3652 from 2010 onwards.
Non-taxable pensions paid on a regular basis (e.g., war pensions). Incorporated into 3602/3652 from 2010 onwards.
Annual bonus, incentive bonus, leave pay, merit awards, retention bonuses, etc.
Annual bonus, incentive bonus, leave pay, merit awards, retention bonuses, etc.

Commission amounts paid or payable to an employee.
Amounts paid as overtime for services rendered. Taxed as normal income.
Amounts paid as overtime for services rendered. Taxed as normal income.
Taxable portion of settlement agreements or court-ordered awards relating to labour disputes.

Non-taxable portion of settlement agreements or court-ordered awards relating to labour disputes.

AllowanceCodes.explanation: Allowance or advance paid to an employee in respect of travelling expenses for business purposes - including fixed travel allowances, petrol-, garage- and maintenance cards. 100% of the value paid must be specified.

Allowance or advance paid to an employee in respect of travelling expenses for business purposes - including fixed travel allowances, petrol-, garage- and maintenance cards. 100% of the value paid must be specified.
Applicable where reimbursement rate exceeds prescribed rate or employee receives other compensation for travel. Only the portion not exceeding prescribed rate is reflected here.
Applicable where reimbursement rate exceeds prescribed rate or employee receives other compensation for travel. Only the portion not exceeding prescribed rate is reflected here.
Applicable where reimbursement rate does not exceed prescribed rate and employee receives no other compensation for travel. Full value of reimbursement is non-taxable.
